title: Video-to-World Diffusion Generation
entry_point: generate(prompt, image_or_video_path, negative_prompt=None) -> tuple[np.ndarray, str] | None
activity_flow: START: generate() called with (prompt, image_or_video_path, negative_prompt)
ACTION: build prompts list [prompt] or [prompt, negative_prompt]
ACTION: extract prompt_embedding[0], negative_prompt_embedding[1 if exists]
ACTION: get_condition_latent(model, image_or_video_path, num_input_frames, state_shape) -> condition_latent
ACTION: get_video_batch(model, embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) -> data_batch, state_shape
ACTION: generate_world_from_video(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed, condition_latent, num_input_frames) -> video_latent
ACTION: model.decode(sample) -> raw frames, clamp & convert to uint8
BRANCH: video is None -> return None [VIDEO GUARDRAIL BLOCKED]

key_methods.generate: Orchestrator; runs prompt upsampler, guardrail checks, text embedding, model inference, video guardrail
key_methods._run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt: V2W override: uses VLM (Pixtral-12B) with prepare_dialog(image_path) + run_chat_completion_vlm()
key_methods._run_tokenizer_encoding: Calls get_condition_latent(model, path, num_input_frames, state_shape) -> condition_latent Tensor
key_methods._run_model: V2W override: calls get_video_batch() then generate_world_from_video() with condition_latent and num_input_frames
key_methods._run_model_with_offload: V2W override: orchestrates tokenizer load -> tokenizer encode -> network load -> diffusion -> network offload -> tokenizer decode -> tokenizer offload
key_methods._run_tokenizer_decoding: Decodes latent via model.decode(), clamps [0,2]/2, returns uint8 numpy [T,H,W,C]
key_methods._load_model: V2W override: uses DiffusionV2WModel class with load_model_by_config()
key_methods._load_prompt_upsampler_model: V2W override: calls create_vlm_prompt_upsampler() (not text-only create_prompt_upsampler)

offload_branches: offload_prompt_upsampler: load VLM before / del+gc after prompt upsample
offload_text_encoder_model: load T5 before / offload after text embedding
offload_tokenizer: load tokenizer before encoding & before decoding / offload after decoding
offload_network: load DiT network after tokenizer encode / offload after diffusion sampling
guardrail_exit_points: After prompt guardrail: return None if prompt is unsafe
After video guardrail: return None if generated video is unsafe
key_relationships: Pipeline composes VLM prompt upsampler (Pixtral-12B, create_vlm_prompt_upsampler)
Pipeline composes T5 text encoder (in BaseWorldGenerationPipeline)
Pipeline uses inference_utils: generate_world_from_video, get_condition_latent, get_video_batch
important_notes: V2W differs from T2W: (1) prompt upsampler is VLM-based (visual), not text-only; (2) _run_tokenizer_encoding is new step unique to V2W; (3) _run_model passes condition_latent + num_input_frames; (4) offload order in _run_model_with_offload is tokenizer-first (encode) → network (diffusion) → network offload → tokenizer (decode) → tokenizer offload. num_input_frames ∈ {1, 9}. Default model: Cosmos-Predict1-7B-Video2World.
